summary: Completed testing of Admin Food Offers Management & Flash Sales System. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All components verified working via screenshots - Food Offers Tab, Flash Sales Tab, FlashSaleBanner with countdown timer on /food page.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/food-offers - Returns all food offers with store info
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/food-offers?status=active - Filter active offers
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/food-offers?status=inactive - Filter inactive offers
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/food-offers/{id} - Admin update offer status
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/food-offers/{id} - Admin update offer quantities
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/admin/food-offers/{id} - Admin delete offer
✅ Backend: Buyer cannot access admin/food-offers (403)
✅ Backend: POST /api/admin/flash-sales - Admin create flash sale
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/flash-sales - Admin view all flash sales
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/flash-sales/{id} - Admin update flash sale
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/flash-sales/{id} - Admin toggle flash sale status
✅ Backend: Seller cannot create flash sales (403)
✅ Backend: Buyer cannot access admin/flash-sales (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/flash-sales/active - Returns only active flash sales
✅ Backend: Flash sale response structure has required fields for frontend
✅ Frontend: /food page shows FlashSaleBanner with countdown timer
✅ Frontend: Flash banner shows '⚡ عرض الافتتاح - خصم 25%'
✅ Frontend: Countdown timer displays hours:minutes:seconds
✅ Frontend: Admin Panel shows 'عروض الفلاش' button with gradient
✅ Frontend: FoodOffersTab has two tabs: 'عروض المتاجر' and 'عروض الفلاش'
✅ Frontend: Store offers tab shows offers with toggle/delete actions
✅ Frontend: Flash sales tab shows 'إنشاء عرض فلاش جديد' button
✅ Frontend: Flash sales tab shows existing flash sale with 'نشط الآن!' badge
✅ Frontend: Flash sale shows edit/toggle/delete action buttons
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: GET /api/admin/food-offers properly enriches offers with store_name and owner_name
admin.py: PUT /api/admin/food-offers/{id} allows admin to update offer status, quantities, dates
admin.py: POST/PUT/GET/DELETE /api/admin/flash-sales properly handles flash sale CRUD
food.py: GET /api/food/flash-sales/active correctly filters by is_active=True, start_time<=now<=end_time
food_orders.py: create_food_order correctly applies flash_discount in addition to offer_discount
FoodOffersTab.js: Proper tab navigation between Store Offers and Flash Sales sections
FoodOffersTab.js: FlashSaleModal with form for name, discount%, start/end time, categories, banner color
FoodPage.js: FlashSaleBanner component with useState/useEffect for countdown timer
AdminPage.js: food-offers tab button properly styled with gradient and data-testid
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed flash sales during testing. Existing flash sale 'عرض الافتتاح - خصم 25%' active for ~6 hours.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Food Offers & Flash Sales system fully tested. Features: 1) Admin can view/update/delete any store offer via /api/admin/food-offers, 2) Admin can CRUD flash sales via /api/admin/flash-sales, 3) Customers see active flash sales via /api/food/flash-sales/active, 4) FoodPage.js shows FlashSaleBanner with live countdown timer, 5) AdminPage.js has 'عروض الفلاش' tab with FoodOffersTab component, 6) Flash discount is added on top of regular offer discount in food orders. Mocked: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - /api/payment/verify-otp

backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/admin/food-offers: Admin view all food offers - supports ?status=active|inactive|pending filter
backend_api_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/food-offers/{id}: Admin update offer (is_active, quantities, dates) - returns 'تم تحديث العرض'
backend_api_endpoints.DELETE /api/admin/food-offers/{id}: Admin delete offer - returns 'تم حذف العرض'
backend_api_endpoints.POST /api/admin/flash-sales: Admin create flash sale with name, discount_percentage, start/end_time, categories
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/admin/flash-sales: Admin view all flash sales sorted by created_at desc
backend_api_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/flash-sales/{id}: Admin update flash sale details and is_active status
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/food/flash-sales/active: Public - returns only currently active flash sales for customer display

FoodPage.js.FlashSaleBanner: Orange/red gradient banner with countdown timer (hours:minutes:seconds)
FoodPage.js.Countdown timer: useEffect with setInterval updating every second until end_time

FoodOffersTab.js.Store offers list: Shows offers with name, store, type badge, toggle/delete buttons
FoodOffersTab.js.Flash sales list: Shows flash sales with discount %, date range, 'نشط الآن!' badge
FoodOffersTab.js.FlashSaleModal: Form for creating/editing flash sales with all fields

AdminPage.js.food-offers tab button: Orange gradient button with megaphone icon

flash_discount_calculation.stacking: Flash discount is ADDED to regular offer discount, not replaced

test_data.existing_store_offer: عرض اشتر 2 واحصل على 1 مجاناً from مطعم الشام الأصيل
